zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Ungarn於1039年出生在匈牙利可馬洛-斯特格姆艾斯特格姆時，她的父親Andreas (I.) von Ungarn26歲，母親Anastasia von Kiew18歲。她於1055年與Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1062年1月27日在捷克普拉哈享年23歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid von Ungarn于1039年出生在匈牙利可馬洛-斯特格姆艾斯特格姆时，她的父亲Andreas (I.) von Ungarn26岁，母亲Anastasia von Kiew18岁。她于1055年与Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1062年1月27日在捷克普拉哈享年23岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Ungarn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Antonio, Cosmo, Fabio, Nicoletta, Quirino, Vito.  Spanish Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Rocio, Rosario.
Italian: ethnic name for a Hungarian or a nickname for someone who had some trading or other connections with Hungary, from ungaro ‘Hungarian’ (from Latin Hungarus).

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Ungarn was born in 1039, in Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungary, her father, Andreas (I.) von Ungarn, was 26 and her mother, Anastasia von Kiew, was 18. She married Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen in 1055. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 January 1062, in Prague, Czechia, at the age of 23.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Ungarn est née en 1039, à Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hongrie, son père, Andreas (I.) von Ungarn, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anastasia von Kiew, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen en 1055. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 janvier 1062, à Prague, République tchèque, à l’âge de 23 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Ungarn 1039 in Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Ungarn geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andreas (I.) von Ungarn 26 und ihre Mutter Anastasia von Kiew 18. Sie hat 1055 Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Januar 1062 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Prag, Tschechien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Ungarn è nata il nel 1039 nel Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Ungheria, sua padre, Andreas (I.) von Ungarn, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Anastasia von Kiew, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen nel 1055. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 gennaio 1062, nel Praga, Cechia, all'età di 23 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Ungarnが1039年にハンガリーコムaロム-エスズテルゴムエスズテルゴムで生まれた時，父Andreas (I.) von Ungarnは26歳，母Anastasia von Kiewは18歳であった。1055年にVratislav (II.) von Böhmenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1062年1月27日にチェコプラハで23歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Ungarn(이)가 1039년 헝가리 코a롬-스즈터고 스즈터고에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andreas (I.) von Ungarn(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anastasia von Kiew(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1055년 Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1062년 1월 27일 체코 프라하에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Ungarn nasceu em 1039, em Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungria, seu pai, Andreas (I.) von Ungarn, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anastasia von Kiew, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen em 1055. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1062, em Praha, Chequia, com 23 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Ungarn родилась в 1039 г. в местности эсзтиргом, комaром-есзтиргом, Венгрия, её отцу по имени Andreas (I.) von Ungarn было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anastasia von Kiew, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen в 1055 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 января 1062 г. в местности Прага, Чехия в возрасте 23 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid von Ungarn nació en 1039, en Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungría, su papá, Andreas (I.) von Ungarn, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anastasia von Kiew, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen en 1055. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de enero de 1062, en Praga, Chequia, a la edad de 23 años.
